title: Offline Article Rewriter

title: Text Case Converter

desc: Free online multi-line text sorter. Sort lines alphabetically, numerically, by length, reverse, or shuffle. Remove duplicates and empty lines easily. All processing is local.

title: Text Deduplication Tool
desc: Remove duplicate lines from text instantly. Supports case-sensitive and fuzzy matching, comparison, and unique extraction locally.

title: Whitespace Cleaner
desc: Free online whitespace cleaner to remove extra spaces, blank lines, and trailing spaces. Normalize line breaks and clean up text formatting instantly in your browser.

title: Word Frequency Analyzer
desc: Analyze word frequency in text. Find most common words, keyword density, and word distribution. Free online text analysis tool for SEO and writing.

title: Case Converter
desc: Free online case converter to instantly transform text into UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, camelCase, snake_case, and more. Batch convert text locally without uploading.

title: Character Counter
desc: Count characters, words, sentences, and paragraphs instantly. Check text limits for Twitter, SMS, and SEO meta descriptions with our free online character counter.

title: Fancy Text Generator
desc: Convert plain text into fancy Unicode fonts instantly. Choose from cursive, bold, script, gothic, and more for your social media bios and posts.

title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
desc: Generate Lorem Ipsum placeholder text instantly. Create paragraphs, sentences, words, or lists for your design and typesetting needs. Free dummy text generator.

title: Reading Time Calculator
desc: Estimate reading and speaking time from any text instantly. Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs with adjustable WPM settings. Perfect for bloggers and content marketers.

title: Slogan Generator
desc: Generate catchy business slogans and taglines for your brand. Customize by industry, keyword, and tone to create the perfect marketing message.

title: Strikethrough Text Generator
desc: Generate strikethrough text instantly using Unicode combining characters. Copy and paste crossed-out text on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Discord, and any platform that supports Unicode.

title: Text Diff Checker

desc: Reverse text by characters, words, or lines instantly. Flip text upside down and create mirrored text with our free online text reverser tool.

title: Text to Speech

title: Typing Speed Test
desc: Test your typing speed in words per minute (WPM) with our free online typing test. Measure your accuracy, track live WPM, and improve your keyboard skills instantly.

desc: Analyze word frequency, density, and keyword distribution to optimize your SEO strategy. Find most used words, n-grams, and reading level metrics. Perfect for content creators and webmasters.

title: Chinese

title: Markdown to HTML Converter
